title: Pearson India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Pearson India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pearson India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Pearson India:
Pearson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pearson India!
